note: The four operator decision surfaces (Ops Deck acceptance A7). Items are addressable by id; the panel renders each queue as a section. v1 is read-only glass - resolving an item happens in session (v2 adds tap-to-approve via ops/commands.jsonl).

taste_review.label: Taste review
taste_review.desc: Shipped + preview-ready work awaiting the operator's feel pass. Minimum friction: tap the link, react in short bursts (uat: ...).

items.title: G1+G2 beginner journey feel pass (cue -> Solo -> modal copy -> Studio tip)
Key-aware spelling on your real progressions (C-F-Bb reads Bb everywhere)
Friction song draft v0.1 - 'Worn Smooth' (F Mixo, Dm verse): react in bursts (chorus A/B, kill lines, image swaps)

planning_approval.label: Planning approval
planning_approval.desc: Scored goalposts waiting for a go/no-go or re-rank. One digit resumes the board.

items.title: Resume goalpost board: G3 S-TYPEFILTER-QUIET (60) next, then G4 S-JAM-STARTER (48)
Merge claude-config #650 - 'any domain is a loop' philosophy addendum (audit APPROVE posted; shared repo = your keystroke)

design_review.label: Design review
design_review.desc: Design calls parked for operator eyes when SME bench + taste could not resolve alone.

items.title: Notable preempt teardown: preempted banner not torn down (two cards visible) - S-NOTABLE-PREEMPT-TEARDOWN

interview.label: Interview
interview.desc: Open question sets. Contract: N questions queued, answering ANY subset unblocks - the rest become assumed answers in the goal spec.

items.title: S2 (M3 songs/tracks full merge) spec-formalize - 30-min question set ready
Key picker flat names (Bb/Eb/Ab as first-class keys) - scope/UX call from FORK-4 wave 2
Org-cockpit question set - 5 Qs, any subset unblocks: first department, its evidence-deliverable, skills-inventory home, v1-polling vs wait-for-Azure, Mike visibility
